---
title: "Miscellaneous"
# subtitle: "Community service, organization, and academic outreach"
# description: "Community service, scientific organization, and outreach activities."
page-layout: full
---

::: {.misc-page}

This page collects selected community-oriented activities and related links.

## Community service and organization

::: {.service-grid}

::: {.service-card}
### Physical Networks Satellite

**Role:** Organizer  
**Period:** 2024--2025, 2025--2026  

I co-organize the Physical Networks satellites at NetSci25 & NetSci26.

[PhysNet IV](https://sites.google.com/view/physnet26){.service-link}

[Web Archive](https://jym16.github.io/physnet-satellite/){.service-link}
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Data Stories

**Role:** Organizer  
**Period:** 2024--2025  

Data Stories is a department-level seminar and community event series designed to create informal exchange around data science, network science, and complex systems research.

[Website](https://networkdatascience.ceu.edu/data-stories){.service-link}
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Japanese--Austrian Researcher Network

**Role:** Organizer / coordinator  
**Period:** 2025--present  

This initiative aims to connect Japanese researchers based in Austria and to support academic exchange, information sharing, and community building across institutions.

[Website](https://jpn-aut-research.github.io/){.service-link}
:::

:::

:::
